title: pelargonium × interlitum
intro: Pelargonium × interlitum, a hybrid plant of the pelargonium species, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × interlitum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
